ticket_goal: Add navigational links from Upcoming Posts sidebar items to Schedule view

technical_specs: Wrap Sidebar upcoming post items in Next.js Link pointing to /schedule?id=[id].
Add hover effects (bg change, cursor: pointer) to sidebar items.
Add a 'View All' link in SidebarInfo header using MUI CalendarMonthIcon.
In SchedulePage, use useSearchParams to detect the post ID.
Update SchedulePage fetch logic: If ID param exists, increase API limit or handle missing post gracefully.
Wait for isLoading === false before attempting scrollIntoView.
Add a pulse highlight animation to the targeted post card in the schedule view.
If ID is provided but post is not found in the list, show a non-intrusive notification.
Use MUI Icons (OpenInNew, ArrowForward) for navigation cues.

fixes_applied: Wrapped sidebar items in Link with target /schedule?id=ID
Added hover effects and indicator scaling in SidebarInfo
Implemented View All button in sidebar header
Updated SchedulePage to use useSearchParams and Suspense
Implemented auto-scroll to targeted post with 300ms delay for stability
Added pulseHighlight animation (3 cycles) and persistent border for targeted posts
Fixed unused accounts prop in SidebarInfo and updated DashboardClient
Verified build, types, and existing tests pass

audit_findings: Adheres to MUI Icon standards (CalendarMonth, OpenInNew).
Correct Next.js 15 Suspense pattern for searchParams.
Implemented required data-testid attributes for E2E testing.
CSS Module used for SidebarInfo styling as per best practices.
Build, Lint, and Type-check passed (pre-existing lint warnings ignored).

scenarios: Sidebar Item -> Schedule View with ID -> Auto-scroll & Highlight
